citation: 12 CFR §1026.43(e)(2) - first-lien tier boundary at $110,260 (inclusive lower bound on high band)
comment: Hand-calc: loan_amount = exactly $110,260. Bands: mid = `66156 <= x < 110260`; high = `>= 110260`. So $110,260 is in HIGH band -> first-lien high threshold = 2.25 pp. apr=0.0800, apor=0.0500 -> spread = 3.00 pp > 2.25 pp -> general_qm_passes=False. Pins the inclusive-lower-bound semantic on the high-band boundary too (symmetric with $66,156 boundary).
